calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration and dismiss the court action" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
